endpoints.name: Get account extensions data by account ID
endpoints.description: Get account extensions data by account ID
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VONAGE_API_KEY}} with your VONAGE API KEY. Replace {{ACCOUNT_ID}} with a real account_id.

endpoints.name: Get extension data by account ID and extension number
endpoints.description: Get extension data by account ID and extension number
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VONAGE_API_KEY}} with your VONAGE API KEY. Replace {{EXTENSION_NUMBER}} with a real extension_number. Replace {{ACCOUNT_ID}} with a real account_id.
